comics.danger.delete.title: కామిక్‌ను తొలగించు

comics.danger.makePrivate.desc: ఈ కామిక్‌ను ప్రైవేట్‌గా చేయడం దానిని ఆవిష్కరణ మరియు శోధన నుండి తొలగిస్తుంది. దీన్ని కొనుగోలు చేసిన లేదా సేవ్ చేసిన వ్యక్తులు ప్రవేశాన్ని కొనసాగిస్తారు.

Check the icons above to see the latest comments, your notes, search your encyclopedia, browse and add new entries to your encyclopedia. genre.scifi.description: Science fiction is a literary genre that explores speculative or futuristic concepts, often incorporating scientific and technological elements. It often deals with imaginative and futuristic concepts, such as advanced science and technology, space exploration, time travel, parallel universes, and extraterrestrial life. Science fiction often delves into social, political, and philosophical issues, reflecting and commenting on contemporary society. It can be categorized into sub-genres such as cyberpunk, hard science fiction, dystopian fiction, and space opera, among others.
genre.fantasy.description: Fantasy is a literary genre that involves elements of magic, supernatural events, and mythical creatures, often set in imaginary worlds. It may feature heroes on quests, battles between good and evil, and coming-of-age tales. Fantasy can be categorized into sub-genres such as high fantasy, urban fantasy, dark fantasy, and fairy tales, among others. It often incorporates themes of morality and ethics, exploring the nature of good and evil.
genre.adventure.description: Adventure is a literary genre that features exciting and often dangerous journeys or quests, usually involving physical action and challenges. It can take place in real or imaginary worlds and often involves exploration, treasure hunting, or survival against the odds. Adventure stories often feature a hero or group of heroes who face and overcome obstacles, often with the help of clever thinking or physical prowess. This genre can be further classified into sub-genres such as swashbucklers, survival tales, and spy fiction, among others.
genre.poetry.description: Poetry is a literary genre that uses language in a highly structured and expressive way to convey emotions, ideas, and images. It often employs rhythmic patterns, sound devices, and figurative language to create a distinctive and powerful effect. Poetry can take many forms, including sonnets, haikus, free verse, and ballads, among others.
genre.comedy.description: Comedy is one of the oldest literary genres that aims to entertain and amuse through the use of humor, wit, and satire. It often features exaggerated characters, situations, and events, with the goal of eliciting laughter and amusement from the audience. Comedy can take many forms, including plays, novels, and films. It often explores themes of social norms, human relationships, and cultural differences, and may provide commentary on contemporary issues in a humorous way.
genre.drama.description: Drama is one of the oldest literary forms that typically tells a story through dialogue and action, often featuring complex characters and conflicts. It can take many forms, including plays, films, and television shows. Drama often explores human relationships and emotions, and may focus on themes of love, betrayal, and tragedy. It may also provide social commentary, reflecting on contemporary issues and attitudes.
genre.nonfiction.description: Non-fiction is a literary genre that deals with real-life events, people, and experiences. It includes a wide range of writing, from memoirs and biographies to essays, journalism, and historical accounts. Non-fiction often aims to inform, educate, or persuade readers, presenting factual information in a clear and engaging way. It may explore social, political, scientific, or cultural issues, and may offer insights into the human condition.
genre.fiction.description: Fiction is a literary genre that involves invented stories, characters, and events, and is often distinguished from other genres such as science fiction or fantasy. It can take many forms, including novels, short stories, and novellas, and often explores the human experience through themes such as love, loss, and redemption. Unlike science fiction or fantasy, fiction typically takes place in a realistic or everyday setting, without incorporating supernatural or speculative elements. However, there can be some overlap between fiction and other genres, and many works can be categorized as multiple genres.
genre.romance.description: Romance is a literary genre that focuses on romantic love and relationships between characters. Romance often involves a central love story, featuring two characters who experience obstacles and conflicts that they must overcome to be together. It may explore themes such as passion, betrayal, and redemption, and may be categorized into sub-genres such as historical romance, contemporary romance, and paranormal romance, among others.
genre.satire.description: Satire is a literary genre that uses humor, irony, and exaggeration to criticize and expose the flaws and vices of society, politics, or individuals. Its primary purpose is to offer a critical message or underlying social commentary. In contrast, comedy is a genre that aims to entertain and amuse through humor, wit, and satire. While comedy may explore social norms and human relationships in a humorous way, it does not necessarily have a critical message or underlying social commentary. Satire is often more pointed and critical, while comedy is more lighthearted and playful.
genre.tragedy.description: Tragedy is one of the oldest literary genres that portrays the downfall or suffering of a tragic hero or heroine due to a fatal flaw or an unfortunate circumstance. It often evokes feelings of pity and fear in the reader or audience, and may explore themes such as fate, destiny, and the human condition. Tragedy aims to provide a cathartic experience for the audience and often has a moral or philosophical message.
genre.crime.description: Crime is a literary genre that revolves around the investigation, commission, and solving of crimes, often involving murder, theft, or other illegal activities. Crime stories often involve complex characters, motives, and relationships, and may explore themes such as justice, morality, and the human psyche. They aim to keep the reader or audience engaged and often provide a sense of closure when the crime is solved or justice is served.
genre.historical.description: Historical fiction is a literary genre that is set in the past and uses fictional characters and events to explore historical events, cultures, and customs. It often involves extensive research to ensure historical accuracy and may incorporate real-life figures or events. It aims to transport the reader or audience to a different time and place, while also providing insight into the human experience across history.
genre.horror.description: Horror is a literary genre that aims to create an intense feeling of fear, dread, or disgust in the reader or audience. It often involves supernatural or inexplicable elements, such as ghosts, monsters, or otherworldly entities, and may explore themes such as death, madness, and the unknown. Horror stories often aim to provoke a visceral response from the audience and may provide commentary on societal fears and anxieties.
genre.mystery.description: Mystery is a genre of fiction that revolves around a crime or puzzle that needs to be solved. Often featuring a detective or amateur sleuth as the protagonist, mysteries typically involve clues, suspects, and a final reveal or solution to the mystery. The genre can include elements of suspense, crime, and psychological thriller.
genre.thriller.description: Thriller is a genre of fiction that is designed to create a feeling of tension, excitement, and suspense in the reader. Typically featuring high stakes, danger, and intense action, thrillers can encompass a wide variety of sub-genres, such as espionage, legal, medical, or psychological thrillers. The goal of the genre is to keep the reader on the edge of their seat and engaged in the story.
genre.western.description: Western is a genre of fiction that typically takes place in the American Old West and features cowboys, outlaws, and lawmen as its central characters. The genre often explores themes of honor, justice, and individualism in a time when civilization was expanding into the frontier. Westerns can be further divided into sub-genres such as traditional, revisionist, or spaghetti westerns.
genre.memoir.description: Memoir is a non-fiction genre that tells the story of a person's life or a specific period of their life. Unlike an autobiography, which covers an entire life, memoirs focus on a particular aspect or event and often employ literary techniques to tell a compelling and engaging story. Memoirs can be written by anyone, from celebrities to ordinary people, and can cover a wide variety of topics and experiences.
genre.biography.description: Biography is a non-fiction genre that tells the story of a person's life. Unlike memoirs, which often focus on a specific period or aspect of a person's life, biographies aim to provide a comprehensive overview of a person's entire life. Biographies can be written about anyone, from historical figures to contemporary celebrities, and can be further classified by sub-genres such as political, cultural, or sports biographies.
genre.steampunk.description: Steampunk is a genre of fiction that combines elements of Victorian-era aesthetics, technology, and culture with futuristic or fantastical elements. Typically taking place in an alternate version of the 19th century, steampunk often features steam-powered machinery, clockwork contraptions, and airships. The genre can encompass a wide variety of sub-genres, such as steampunk mystery or steampunk romance.
genre.mythology.description: Mythology is a genre that explores the myths, legends, and stories of a particular culture or society. Often involving gods, goddesses, heroes, and monsters, mythology can provide insights into a culture's beliefs, values, and traditions. The genre can encompass a wide variety of sub-genres, such as Greek mythology, Norse mythology, or world mythology.
genre.fairytale.description: Fairy Tale is a genre of fiction that typically features magical elements, fantastic creatures, and enchanted settings. Often aimed at children, fairy tales typically involve a moral or lesson and can be traced back to oral traditions from around the world. The genre can encompass a wide variety of sub-genres, such as traditional fairy tales, modern retelling, or dark fairy tales.
genre.superhero.description: Superhero is a genre of fiction that typically features characters with extraordinary abilities or powers who use them to protect the world from evil or harm. Often wearing distinctive costumes or masks, superheroes can embody a variety of ideals and values, such as justice, compassion, or freedom. The genre can encompass a wide variety of sub-genres, such as superhero team-ups, origin stories, or alternate universes.
genre.children.description: Children's literature is a literary genre is specifically aimed at young readers, ranging from infants to pre-teens. These books can cover a diverse range of topics and themes, including adventure, fantasy, education, and moral lessons. The goal of children's literature is to entertain, engage, and educate young readers while fostering a love of reading.
genre.postapocalyptic.description: This sub-genre of science fiction or speculative fiction is set in a world or society after a catastrophic event has occurred, such as a global disaster, war, or pandemic. Post-apocalyptic stories often explore themes of survival, adaptation, and rebuilding, with characters fighting to survive against harsh environments and societal breakdowns. Often bleak and harrowing, these stories can also offer a glimmer of hope for humanity's future.
genre.political.description: Documents focusing on political matters, societal matters or for example artistic manifestos.
genre.history.description: Historical documents and other literary materials of historical significance or describing historical events.
genre.isekai.description: This sub-genre of Japanese light novels, manga, and anime revolves around a character being transported or reincarnated into a different world or alternate universe. The protagonist must navigate and adapt to the new world's unique cultures and environments, often gaining new abilities and encountering new allies and enemies along the way. These stories can range from light-hearted and comedic to dark and intense, but always offer a fresh and imaginative take on classic adventure themes.

homepage.iAm.aria: Select between display of features for readers and writers
homepage.reader.title: Reading has never been so interesting like this
homepage.reader.readingDesc: Delve deeper into your favorite fictional universe in Literary Universe. Stories in Literary Universe are connected within the same universe, giving you immediate access to the universe encyclopedia from the story reader.
homepage.reader.favoriteTitle: Find out more about Your favorite stories and authors
homepage.reader.favoriteDesc: Universe encyclopedia and author's blogs are just a few feature that will help you find out everything you need to know about your favorite stories, their settings and their creators!
homepage.reader.communityDesc: Meet people from across the globe on dedicated universe and author's forums, blogs and other community features where like-minded fans gather. All in one place.
homepage.reader.readingFeatureTitle: Enjoy an immersive yet practical reading experience
homepage.reader.readingFeatureDesc: From stories and universe, have the benefit of effortless reading with access to details without needing to switch between pages.
homepage.reader.readingExploreTitle: Explore all the minutia in the universe
homepage.reader.readingExploreDesc: Universe encyclopedia allows you to learn all the details about the universe and fully immerse yourself in the stories.
homepage.writer.title: Showcase your universe and share your stories
homepage.writer.writingDesc: Experience the new way of writing with Literary Universes Workshop. Create all the details of your universe in an encyclopedia to share with your readers and write amazing stories on that foundation.
homepage.writer.collaborationDesc: Creative process often involves multiple people. No worries, we got you covered! You can easily add beta readers, co-authors and translators to your stories and universes.
homepage.writer.communityDesc: Go beyond writing and connect with your readers via blogs, forums and other community features connected to your universes or to you as a writer.
homepage.writer.workshopFeatureTitle: One place for all your creative needs
homepage.writer.workshopFeatureDesc: Our ever evolving workshop is the central place for your creative needs. From a simple idea create amazing universes, stories and everything else that is needed around it.
homepage.writer.monetizationDesc: We strongly believe that people should be payed for their work and are constantly looking for new monetization opportunities for writers. Monetization feature allows you writers to be appreciated for what you do. Explore all the different options that allow your fans to show you their appreciation.
about.title: About Literary Universe
about.desc: History, secrets and humans behind Literary Universe.
about.text.1: సాహిత్య విమానం రచనాకారులు మరియు ఆసక్తి విద్యార్థులకు కలిగి ఉంది. రచయితలు డాష్బోర్డ్ మెనులో "వర్క్షాప్" బటన్‌ను ఎంచుకోవచ్చు. దానిదోనే, మెయిన్ ఎడిటర్ మరియు ఎన్సైక్లోపీడియా ఫంక్షన్లను ఉపయోగించి, మీ వ్యక్తిగత కథా విశ్వరంగానికి అన్ని పైకిన సంగతులను సారించడానికి ఒక పేజీ కలలో సమర్పిస్తుంది. సామాజిక లక్షణాలు రచయితలకు తమ పనిని షేర్ చేయడానికి, అనుచరులను కల్పించడానికి అనుమతిస్తాయి అనే అభిప్రాయం ఉంది.
about.text.2: రీడర్లు మొదటికే కేవలం కొత్త పనితీరుగులు కనుగొనడానికి మరియు అవర ఇష్టపడే రచయితలను అన్వేషించడానికి వెబ్‌సైట్‌ను ఉపయోగించవచ్చు, కానీ రచయిత అనుమతి ఇవ్వనిసరిగా ప్రకాశించిన కథలను సవంత్వరం సవరించడం కూడా అవసరం అవుతుంది. లిటరరీ యూనివర్స్‌లో రీడర్‌గా ఉండడం పూర్తిగా కొత్త చదివే అనుభవం అందిస్తున్నది - ప్రధాన కథనుల యొక్క పేజీలో ఉన్న అన్ని నేపథ్య సమాచారం చూడడం ద్వారా రచయితని మనసులో చిత్రీకరించడానికి అవకాశం కలుగుతుంది.
about.text.3: లిటరరీ యూనివర్స్‌లో భవిష్యత్తు రచయితలు తమ పనిని అమర్చే ఒక మార్కెట్‌ప్లేస్‌ను సృష్టించాలని, మరియు బ్లాగ్లు మరియు ఫోరమ్‌లతో రచయితలు మరియు రీడర్‌ల నడుమ యొక్క సంప్రదనను పెంచే సాధనాలను జోడించకుండా విస్తరించే విశేషాలను జోడించాలని, ఈ పరిధిలో పెనుకుల వారి సాధనలను పరిచయం చేశాము. ప్రస్తుతం మీరు మొదలుకు రూపొందించిన 12 పనితీరులతో కూడి పెట్టే మరువని వ్రాయించవచ్చు. మరింత పనితీరులను ప్లాన్ చేసుకోవడానికి ప్రజల అనువర్తనంలో ఇన్ని అనువర్తనాలను ప్రవర్తించాలనుకుంటున్నాము. మేము చదివేవారు మరియు రచయితల అనుభవాలను విపరీతంగా నైపుణ్యపూరితని ద్వారా ఇంటర్‌నెట్ మీడియంను ఆధారం చేసి మరియు ఆకర్షక ఆధారంగా.
about.text.4: We hope that you join us as we explore what the internet medium can do for creative writing!
about.jan: జాన్ లిటరరీ యూనివర్స్ నుంచి ఉన్నట్లు లేదా ఆందోళనం కలిగినటువంటి రచనాత్మక చరిత్రల యొక్క స్థాయిని మనే పేజలో ఉన్న నేపథ్య సమాచారంతో తీసుకురండి. చదివినప్పుడుగానే ఏ వేరే వెబ్ చర్యను ప్రజల ప్రొఫైల్ పేజిలో నేర్పెడితే మరియు మారింత రచయితలు, రీడర్లతో సందేశాలను పంచుకోవడానికి కమ్యూనిటీ ప్రాధాన్యతను పెంచాలని లక్ష్యంతో మేము కోరుకొన్న విపులమైన విశేషాలను ఈ ఎప్పుడు పరచాల్సిన కలనంతికి ఇంటర్నెట్ మధ్యమానికి అపూర్వ అంశాలు తీసుకురండాలని ఉంటాయి.
about.history.text: 2010లో, జాన్ రాచేస్టర్ టెక్నాలజీ ఆఫ్ టెక్నాలజీపై తన తెలుగు అవగాహనను పొందడానికి చదివించాడు, లేదా ఆకృత్రిల రచనా వ్యవసాయం నిర్మించడానికి లక్ష్యంతో. ఈ దృష్టి రూపం తీసుకోవడం 2013లో ఉదాహరణకు భారతదేశీయ కళా మందిరంలో ఆచార్య పల్లవ్ నిర్వహించిన మొదటి నిర్మాణంగా మూడు సంవత్సరాల తర్వాత సిస్టమ్ బస్తవంతం పొందించింది. జాన్ తన అధ్యయనాన్ని కొనసాగించాడు, మరియు 2016లో మాస్టర్స్ క్యాప్స్టోన్ ప్రాజెక్టుగా క్రేతం సృష్టిస్తూ, అనువప్రవేశం అయిన కొత్త వెర్షన్‌ను సృష్టించారు. ప్రాజెక్టు 2016లో కనిపించిన వరకు అభివృద్ధి అయింది, కనీసంగా ప్రచరణలో ఉండే ఈ వినియోగకు మరియు ఇప్పటికే మీరు చూసే ప్లాట్‌ఫారం వికసించబడింది.

homepage.intro: Let Your Creativity Run Wild Across the Literary Universe
homepage.explanation: మీరు ఒక కథానాయిక ప్రపంచం అభివృద్ధి చేయాలని కనిపించినా, అది అత్యంత వివరమైనది కానీ మీరు కూడా దాటిపోయినట్లయితే ఏమి జరుగుతుందో తెలుసుకుందాం. సాహిత్య విప్రములకు, అత్యుత్తమ సాధనాలు మరియు మద్దతు కల్పించే స్థలం లిటరరీ యూనివర్స్ ఉంది. ప్రతి రచయిత మహత్వమైన వనరులు మరియు మద్దతును పొందవలసిన ఒక అన్ని-సమావేశక ప్రాంతం అది. రచయితలకు ఇది ఒక స్వప్న పనిముట్టే స్థలం; చదివినవారికి, అభియానం అన్వేషణ యాత్రగా ఉండేది. కథానాయిక మొగుడిన గుహలో ఎక్కడ దారి మూసేది అందరికీ తెలిసిందామని మేము లిటరరీ రబ్బిట్ హోల్ అనుసరించేందుకు మాకు చేరండి.
gdpr.title: GDPR Compliance
gdpr.explained: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) is a data protection law from the European Union that regulates how personal data is collected, processed, stored, and protected. GDPR exists to ensure that every user knows what data is being collected, understands how it is used and has full control over their personal information.
gdpr.compliant: Although LiteraryUniverse operates globally, we apply GDPR principles as a standard of trust and transparency for all users.
dmca.title: Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) Policy
dmca.subtitle: Copyright Dispute Policy
dmca.summary:
• You can report infringing content via Report button.
  • You will need to show that you own the work you claim is infringed.
  • We review all valid reports withing 24-72 hours.
  • The reported party has 14 days to submit a counter-notice.
dmca.explained.title: What is DMCA?
dmca.explained.text:
The Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) is a copyright protection law that safeguards original digital works such as stories, illustrations, audio, and other creative content published online.
LiteraryUniverse fully respects the rights of creators and applies DMCA procedures to protect both content owners and platform users in a fair and transparent manner.
dmca.reporting.title: Procedure for Reporting Copyright Infringements.
dmca.reporting.text:
1. Internal Property (IP hosted on Literary Universe)

    If the IP exists on our platform, you may submit a report directly using the Report button available on the content, you will then be promted to select which of your work is being infringed upon.

  2. External Property (IP not hosted on Literary Universe)

    If the IP is not hosted on Literary Universe, you may submit a report using the Report button on the creative property that is infringing.

    Do note that this option might take us longer to validate and we might require additional materials to confirm the infringement.
dmca.reporting.requirements:
For both cases, you must provide the following:
  • You full legal name and contact details
  • Valid proof of ownership of the infringed work (automatically included for internal property)
  • Valid proof of infringement
  • URL of the original content (automatic for internal property)
  • A good-fait statement confirming the report is accurate, to the best of your abilities and knowledge
dmca.reporting.warning: False claims may result in permanent restriction from submitting future copyright reports and legal fees.
dmca.ourActions.title: Our Actions
dmca.ourActions.text:
Once a Proper Bona Fide Infringement Notification is received:
  • We will verify your credentials and ownership claim.
  • If everything is valid, we will proceed to check your claim. If we determine claim as true we will make the infringing property inaccessible until:
    • A counter-notice is resolved
    • OR 14 days have passed without response
  • If no valid counter-notice is received, the content will be permanently removed.
Our goal is to protect creators while ensuring fair due process for all users.
dmca.counterNotice.title: Counter-Notice
dmca.counterNotice.text:
If your content has been removed and you believe it was taken down in error, you may submit a counter-notice in the Resolution Center in the story or universe of the affected work. You will have 14 days from the initial notification to submit a counter-notice.

Your counter-notice must include:

  • Your legal identity and contact information
  • Any proof of ownership of the work
  • A statement of good faith belief that the work is not infringing
  • A legal declaration that all information is accurate

Once submitted, our team will review the dispute.
gdpr.summary:
• We only collect data necessary to operate the platform or those you want to share.
  • We do not sell your data.
  • You may access, edit, export, or delete your data at any time.
  • We apply industry-standard security to protect your data.
gdpr.desc: The General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and how data is protected at Literary Universe.
gdpr.data.title: What Data we collect
gdpr.data.desc: Besides the data you put into your profile or generated through your interaction (messages, stories, etc.) we try to collect as little as possible. We collect Technical Information, such as IP address, browser type, and operating system, to ensure the security and functionality of our platform. In limited fashion we log your actions on our platform for security and functionality purposes. Occasionally we might collect data for marketing purposes, these will be through third party services which respect GDPR and you will always have option to opt-out.
gdpr.dataUse.title: How we use Your Data
gdpr.dataUse.desc:
Your data is used for the following purposes:
  • Providing core platform features (e.g., accounts, content publishing, messaging)
  • Security, abuse prevention, and fraud detection
  • Functional analytics to improve performance and user experience
  • Legal compliance and responding to valid requests
  • Internally, we share anonymized data with our authors when you read their stories
  • We provide your email and country to Stripe for payment processing and fraud protection
  • For marketing purposes, we might use your data, but you will always have option to opt-out (cookie banner, etc.)
gdpr.dataStorage.title: Data storage & security
gdpr.dataStorage.desc:
• All data (except non-sensitive audio visual data) is stored using secure encrypted systems
  • Access is restricted to authorized personnel only utilizing industry standard secure access
  • We regularly perform security audits and updates to ensure the safety of your data
  • All internal communication is over encrypted channels
Despite best efforts, no online system is ever 100% immune. In rare case of a data breach, users will be notified as promptly as possible, as required by law.
gdpr.rights.title: Your rights under GDPR
gdpr.rights.desc:
Under GDPR you have the following rights. You can find options to perform these in your user settings or at the given content:
  • Right to access - Request data we store about you
  • Right to erasure - Delete all your data from our servers (limits apply due to applicable laws and our agreement with you - when it comes to stories)
  • Right to restriction of processing - Limit how your data is used
  • Right to data portability - import/export your data
gdpr.dataRetention.title: Data retention
gdpr.dataRetention.desc:
We store your data:
  • As long as your account is active
  • Or as long as required for legal, security, or operational purposes
  • In case of published creative works, we store them idenfinitelly unless agreed to otherwise
gdpr.contact.title: Contact
gdpr.contact.desc:
We are only human, so if you have any requests, questions, concerns or we missed something, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Email: privacy@literaryuniverse.com

copyrights.about: Literary Universe takes Copyright very seriously. All the content that is published by users is their own and available under the license that is specified. Beside the full set of Creative Commons licenses, Literary Universe also offers 2 commercial licenses, exclusive and non-exclusive.
copyrights.nonExclusiveLicense: The Literary Universe Non-Exclusive License allows you to publish on Literary Universe without giving away any of your rights as the copyright holder. You are free to publish anywhere else. Literary Universe only reserves the right to use your IP for marketing purposes. If you decide to sell you IP on Literary Universe the platform will charge 30% platform fee.
copyrights.exclusiveLicense: The Literary Universe Exclusive License allows you to publish on Literary Universe exclusively. That means you can't publish your IP on other online platforms or anything else outside of Literary Universe. If you want to publish a physical medium like a book you need to ask as for permission. If Literary Universe doesn't respond in 30 days then that is automatic consent. In the future we hope to offer you physical publishing and other services via our partners. Don't be afraid to contact us, we wish for your success and in most cases we are just looking out for fraudulent companies. Still this is restrictive, so as a thank you, the platform fee is only 10%.
copyrights.licensesAreImportant: Choosing a license is extremely important and affects how your work will be accessed in the future. To make selection easier you can check out our license chooser bellow.
mission.title: Mission & Vision
mission.desc: Literary Universe's mission: to make authorship a livable craft, so human imagination endures. Read our cause, core values, vision, and company culture.
mission.keieirinen: To make authorship a livable craft, so human imagination endures.
mission.intro: Literary Universe is more than a platform — it is a mission-driven company grounded in values that guide every decision. We strive to build a company that endures for generations, combining innovation with respect for history and tradition. Inspired by Simon Sinek's <link>The Infinite Game</link> and family-run Japanese businesses, we aim to build something lasting and meaningful for authors and readers alike.
mission.cause.title: Our cause
mission.cause.text.1: Most authors earn little to nothing from their work, often undervaluing their creations by giving them away. Literary Universe gives authors the resources to produce, promote, and profit from their work, enabling them to pursue writing as a real career. When our authors succeed, we succeed.
mission.cause.text.2: Stories are vital to society — they inspire and teach across generations. Yet new pressures, including the rapid commodification of creative output by AI, risk dissuading future authors from entering the craft. And as a result even the AI tools will start to suffer from the lack of human generated content to learn from. Literary Universe gives writers the tools, community, and encouragement to flourish, nurturing creativity and literacy from a young age by reaching out to schools and communities.
mission.cause.text.3: We simplify the creative process by integrating everything authors and readers need into a single platform. From creating stories to managing intellectual property to building a fanbase, Literary Universe is the central hub — ensuring authors have full visibility and control over their work and its connections.
mission.values.title: Core values
mission.values.supremacy.title: Supremacy of Human Imagination
mission.values.supremacy.text: We believe human creativity is irreplaceable. AI assists but must never supplants the author's voice. We actively combat low-effort AI slop through labeling, filtering, and prioritization of human-authored works. We will support initiatives for passing down the craft and support authors.
mission.values.paid.title: Get authors paid
mission.values.paid.text: A platform that fails its creators eventually fails its readers. Author income is our primary product metric, not a downstream consequence. Transparent economics, clear ownership terms, and fair revenue shares are non-negotiable.
mission.values.newGen.title: Supporting new generations of writers
mission.values.newGen.text: Education, mentorship, and on-boarding are core to the platform — not optional add-ons. Workshops, writing challenges, and accessible craft resources help new authors flourish.
mission.values.oneStop.title: A one-stop shop
mission.values.oneStop.text: Authors and readers should not have to assemble their creative or reading lives from a half-dozen disconnected services. Literary Universe brings creation, publishing, discovery, community, and monetization into a single connected experience.
mission.values.freedom.title: Creative freedom
mission.values.freedom.text: Creativity thrives on freedom. We support authors' ability to explore complex ideas while adhering to copyright laws and ethical boundaries. We avoid operating in totalitarian countries where free expression cannot be upheld.
mission.values.family.title: Pro-family and pro-humanity
mission.values.family.text: We believe stories help families, communities, and civilizations transmit wisdom, courage, imagination, and memory across generations. We support a company culture that respects family life, long-term health, and meaningful work. Family subscriptions and parental controls are first-class features, not afterthoughts. We reject technology that treats humans as disposable inputs or attention units.
mission.values.meritocracy.title: Freedom and meritocracy
mission.values.meritocracy.text: We reject locking users into our platform or advancing political agendas. We earn loyalty through excellence and integrity, fostering a space where merit and innovation thrive. In an era of declining trust in large platforms — marked by opaque rule changes, exploitative advertising, weakened creator control, and recurring "platform betrayal" cycles — founder mission control serves as a guarantor that the mission stays on track.
mission.values.transparency.title: Transparency
mission.values.transparency.text: Authors deserve full visibility into sales, payouts, and the rules that govern them. Literary Universe promotes trust through clear, accessible data on the platform.
mission.values.ergonomic.title: Ergonomic to human flourishing
mission.values.ergonomic.text: Accelerate human flourishing. We support creativity and human well-being, ensuring the platform uplifts users rather than exploiting them. By highlighting meaningful content, we foster inspiration and deeper connection. We will not build a business model around exploiting reader data or manipulating attention through addictive design. We will invest into in-person events to foster human connection and community.
mission.values.tradition.title: Respect for history and tradition
mission.values.tradition.text: We value the lessons of the past and the stability of tradition. By innovating with technology, we link digital and physical formats, collaborating with traditional publishers for mutual growth.
mission.vision.title: Vision
mission.vision.loyal.title: Fiercely loyal customers
mission.vision.loyal.text: We aim to be more than a product. By fostering community and offering exceptional support, we create a space authors and readers are proud to call home. Local meetups and personalized support for top-tier subscribers strengthen these bonds.
mission.vision.niche.title: Niche dominance
mission.vision.niche.text: Rather than chasing the general market, we focus on excelling in science fiction, fantasy, and adjacent long-form genres — those that benefit most from our worldbuilding tools. Indie SFF is our beachhead. From there, we expand by genre and geography.
mission.vision.beyond.title: Beyond the platform
mission.vision.beyond.text: We see in-person events and meetups as essential for building meaningful connections. Literary Universe, though digital, encourages face-to-face connection to spark creativity and strengthen bonds.
mission.vision.future.title: Future dreams
mission.vision.future.text: We dream of initiatives like StoryCon — an annual writers' conference — and of creating spaces where authors can recharge and create, such as retreats or inspirational offices.
mission.vision.stability.title: Foundational stability
mission.vision.stability.text: Our immediate goal is to build a stable platform, achieve financial sustainability, and foster a healthy work-life balance for our team. This foundation lets us grow responsibly and endure challenges.
mission.culture.title: Company culture
mission.culture.capable.title: Capable individuals and teams
mission.culture.capable.text: We seek highly skilled people who can excel in a dynamic startup environment. Team trust and collaboration are vital, supported by events that build camaraderie and resilience.
mission.culture.oss.title: Open-source philosophy
mission.culture.oss.text: Open source helps us develop efficiently while contributing to the broader community. It fosters innovation, attracts top talent, and aligns with our values of transparency and freedom. We give back and remain active in the communities that support our success.
mission.cultural.title: Cultural impact
mission.cultural.longForm.title: Encouraging long-form content
mission.cultural.longForm.text: In an era of short attention spans, we champion long-form storytelling. As long-form podcasts have shown, audiences value meaningful, immersive, thought-provoking content. Our platform is built around the story world — a unit of imagination that can sustain prose, comics, audio, and lore over years.
mission.cultural.ai.title: Ethical AI integration
mission.cultural.ai.text: AI is here. AI should assist authors, not replace them. Literary Universe uses AI for supportive tasks like editing, research, and translation while ensuring human creativity remains central. AI-generated stories are categorized separately and labelled clearly, protecting the prominence of human authors while still allowing experimentation with new technologies and formats. Creators retain control over whether their work can be used to train external AI systems.
mission.cultural.slop.title: Combating slop culture
mission.cultural.slop.text: We are not anti-AI. We believe some creators will eventually build meaningful AI-generated work with real audiences. But the current market is being flooded with AI slop — low-effort, mass-produced, undifferentiated automated content that overwhelms discovery systems, frustrates readers, and makes it harder for skilled authors to be seen and paid. Literary Universe addresses this with clear labeling of human-authored, AI-assisted, and AI-generated content; discovery systems that prioritize trust and quality signals; anti-spam rules against mass-generated uploads; and human curation for important showcases. The goal is not to ban technology — it is to protect meaningful storytelling.
mission.cultural.politics.title: Resisting political sways
mission.cultural.politics.text: We avoid political or ideological agendas that distract from our mission. Literary Universe focuses on fostering creativity and professionalism while respecting diverse perspectives without endorsing activism. Many of the loudest shouting in the news, moral panics, often prove to be nothing more than just a momentary blib or a footnote in the grand story of humanity. That is why our focus is on art and tradition.

payment.fanClub.platformFeeExplained: We are working towards our platform fee covering fees from payment providers such as credit card fees and others, but sometimes there might be overflow. If that happens please let us know so that we can investigate and reduce the impact in the future. As such you should not see any of those fees effect your total, but if you do please let us know. Another big impact on your net value are taxes. In countries like USA where it is common to have taxes to be exclusive of the price you will not be affected, in countries where it is common to have taxes inclusive in the price (like the EU), you need to account for your country's VAT when setting the subscription price.

workshop.fictionalTime.formDescription:
Here you can create your own fictional time. Currently, this tool is limited and is only capable of creating
        symmetric times. This means you won't be able to recreate the Mayan calendar or the Gregorian calendar. At this moment,
        this tool expects that all time periods are always the same, e.g., months always have 30 days with no exceptions and so
        on. We will address this in later versions, but until then, this tool is more suited for creating primarily
        sci-fi based time systems.

workshop.statusExplain.hiatus1: Hiatus means that you are stepping away from working on this story for a while for what ever reason. It will tell your readers that they should not expect any new updates in the coming weeks or even up to few months.
workshop.statusExplain.hiatus2: The hiatus status will be automatically lifted if you publish any chapter. Or you can change it your self.
workshop.statusExplain.hiatus3: If you keep your story in hiatus for six months, we will automatically mark this story as cancelled.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled1: We are sorry to hear that you can't continue working on the story. On the other hand we are happy that you are willing to let your readers know.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled2: Cancelling story will let your readers know that they should not expect any new updates.
workshop.statusExplain.cancelled3: You can always revert this by publishing a chapter or changing the status.
workshop.statusExplain.finished1: Congratulations! After all that hard work you have finally reached the end of an incredible journey. While the story might end now, we hope that there will be more stories to tell in the future, but for now, relax and enjoy the well earned rest.
workshop.statusExplain.finished2: Marking story as complete will tell the readers that the story is finished. While you shouldn't be adding any new chapters we won't stop you and adding special chapters isn't a bad idea, to for example add more epilogues for all characters.
workshop.statusExplain.finished3: While you can always cancel this status we highly advice against it. If the story is to continue it might be better to start a new story.

workshop.statusChangeEmail.hiatusWhatFol: This status will be automatically lifted if you publish a new chapter. If you don't publish a new chapter in the next 6 months we will automatically set the story as cancelled.

workshop.statusChangeEmail.cancellationW: This has happened because you haven't posted any new chapter to the story since it was set to hiatus 6 months ago. After a year of inactivity, we automatically set stories to cancelled so that readers know which stories are active.
This status will be automatically lifted if you publish a new chapter. If you don't plan to work on this story anymore there is nothing else that you need to do.

workshop.timer.type.timer.desc: Simple stopwatch that starts at 0:00 and counts upward. Perfect for tracking total writing time in a session or seeing how long you've been working continuously. Never ends automatically - you control when to stop.
workshop.timer.type.countdown.desc: Countdown timer that starts from your set duration and counts down to zero. Great for time-boxed writing sessions, word sprints, or when you want to work for a specific amount of time before taking a break.
workshop.timer.type.pomodoro.desc: Structured productivity technique: 25-minute focused work sessions alternating with 5-minute breaks. After 4 cycles, takes a longer 15-30 minute break. Scientifically proven to improve focus and prevent burnout.
workshop.timer.mode.regular.desc: Timer runs continuously regardless of your activity. Best for disciplined writers who want to track time even when researching, editing, or taking short breaks. Timer keeps going when you switch tabs or stop typing.
workshop.timer.mode.improved.desc: Smart timer that automatically pauses when you switch browser tabs. Perfect for focused writing sessions where you want accurate tracking of actual writing time, not total time spent on the page.
workshop.timer.breakType.soft.desc: Gentle reminder approach: Shows a small notification when break time starts. You can choose to continue working if you're in 'the zone' or take the break. Good for flexible writers who sometimes need to extend productive sessions.
workshop.timer.breakType.hard.desc: Strict enforcement: Displays a full-screen modal that prevents further input until the break timer completes. Forces you to step away from the keyboard. Ideal for writers who struggle with self-discipline or workaholics who need enforced rest periods.
workshop.timer.duration.timer.desc: How long you plan to write in this session. Start with 25-50 minutes for focused work, or set longer sessions (2-4 hours) for deep writing days.
workshop.timer.duration.countdown.desc: Target writing time before the timer ends. Try 25 minutes for focused sprints, 45-60 minutes for substantial work sessions, or 90 minutes for creative deep dives.
workshop.timer.workDuration.desc: Length of focused work sessions. Traditional Pomodoro uses 25 minutes. Try 15-20 minutes if you find it hard to concentrate for longer periods, or 45-50 minutes for experienced writers who can maintain deep focus.
workshop.timer.breakDuration.desc: Rest period between work sessions. Standard is 5 minutes for short breaks. Use 10-15 minutes for longer breaks that allow you to step away from your desk, stretch, or get a drink. Every 4th break is automatically longer (2-3x duration).
